creator: Linda Faire Ripper
description: These slides were taken by Linda Faire Ripper in 1969. She worked as a DOD teacher in Swineford and Okinawa. She visited Kenya, London, Angkor Wat and the Philippines. She had many stories to tell of her overseas adventures and would show the slides to friends and family over the years.
subject: historical

title: London, Munich, Venice, Kenya, Cambodia, Phillipines - 1969 - 35mm Slides
